title: bidens subalternans var. typica
intro: Bidens subalternans var. typica, also known as small bur-marigold or small beggartick, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens subalternans var. typica include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
